retrieved_result: Chagrin River Park Alert: The playground located at the park's Reeves Road access will be replaced between April 10 and April 13. Most of the park's natural areas are made up of dense shrubs with pockets of mature forest bordering wetland areas. Look for great blue herons, kingfishers, bank swallows and sandpipers nea
